name: Collaboration | Deceit's Distillery
description:
◈◆◈◆◈◆◈◈◆◈◆◈◆◈◆◈◈◆◈◆◈◆◈◆◈◈◆◈◆◈◆◈◆◈

I'm thrilled to announce an exciting collaboration with four incredible creators, bringing to life a series I've been crafting behind the scenes.

Beginning February 9th, a new bot will debut daily. Each story will reveal pivotal moments that piece together a larger narrative, culminating in a shocking finale.

Deceit's Distillery will be about the story of a tragedy set in the Big Apple during the prohibition period in 1920s america. It follows the fictional family of Al Capone and the inter-family drama seen with your eyes. How far will you go to survive in a world of deceit, ambition, and betrayal?

Follow the series and uncover the hidden truths of Deceit's Distillery!

◈◆◈◆◈◆◈◈◆◈◆◈◆◈◆◈◈◆◈◆◈◆◈◆◈◈◆◈◆◈◆◈◆◈
